---
title: Example Project mnemosyne directory
---

Represents the `<project>/mnemosyne/` directory that the vault's
`projects/example` symlink targets. In the real orchestrator topology this is
a directory inside a normal project repo, carrying per-project plans and
Tier 1 knowledge.

For the spike, its only job is to host the two test notes below the symlink
boundary so we can observe whether Obsidian's features reach them.
